title: narcissus × odorus subsp. trilobus
intro: Narcissus × odorus subsp. trilobus, also known as Chinese Narcissus or Lanzhou Narcissus, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Amaryllidaceae, characterized by its three-lobed leaves and fragrant, white flowers. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its potential anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Narcissus × odorus subsp. trilobus are believed to include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its flowers can also be used to make a fragrant essential oil.
